title: Lichenomima onca Mockford 1991
author: González-Obando, Ranulfo

steps.title: Lichenomima onca Mockford, 1991 Diagnosis
steps.instruction: Lichenomima onca Mockford, 1991 Diagnosis. Phallosome with side strut separate, joined by membrane, parameres joined only by membranes, each shaft somewhat swollen in distal one-third, with shelf-like lateral process before apex (Mockford

steps.title: (Fig
steps.instruction: (Fig. 172); hypandrium triangular, longer than wide, with gently curved lobulate apex, base with short extensions forward at sides (see Fig. 366 in Mockford 1991). Records: 1 male, COLOMBIA. Valle del Cauca. Santiago de Cali. La Buitrera. 3°22’20.5’’N: 76°34’11.3’’W. 1153m. 01.viii.

steps.title: J
steps.instruction: J. Panche, J. Hoyos. Led light trap in forest canopy. 5 males, 10 females, Colombia, Santander, El Carmen de Chucuri, La Belleza, Casa Tulipanes, 6°34’2.91”N: 74°7’52.50”W. 247m. MUSENUV slide code: 31318,
